title: Green Screen Concrete
description: Vibrant Red, Green & Blue Concrete Perfect for Chroma Keying.
body:
This Simple Resource Pack Changes The **Red, Lime, and Blue Concrete** Colour To Be Cleaner and More Vibrant, Ideal For **Chroma Key** (Green Screen) Use In Video and Image Editing.

It's Recommended to Turn Off **Smooth Lighting** When Using This Pack To Remove the Shading of Blocks.

<details>
<summary>Smooth Lighting On vs Off</summary>

</details>
